titleStmt.title: SII 39.67: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 67. (A.R. No. 67 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL (INSIDE) JAṬĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDRAPĀṆḌYADĒVA-10th YEAR, 13TH CENTURY A.D.

summary.p: This inscription registers the lease of templelands given to Uyyavandāṉ alias Parākramapāṇḍya-Naraśiṅgadēvaṉ by the temple trustees Mahēśvarar for the maintenance of temple. Ellāndalaiyāṉa-Pāṇḍya Piramādirāyaṉ, Vīrapāṇḍya-Piramādirāya-Chokka-bhaṭṭaṉ, Kulaśēkhara bhaṭṭaṉ, Ālāla Sundara bhaṭṭaṉ, Uyyaneri-kāṭṭinaṉ etc., are mentioned as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī maṟkittikku mel śrī koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu
10 vatu vraścika nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu catuddiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ puṟamalaināṭṭu tiru
kkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil śrī ruttira śrī māheśvararum tāṉa
ttomum Uyyavantāṉāṉa parākramapāṇṭiya naraciṅkatevaṟkup piṭipāṭupaṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr
kāṇiyāṭci Āṇṭārkaḷ Aṭaivu nāliloṉṟum paṟṟi Aṉupavittu kāṇiyāṭci Āṇṭārkaḷ Aṭaivu nāliloṉṟum paṟṟi Aṉupavittu kāṇiyāṇṭu pōvariṉṟi muṉṟu A
ṭaivākam paṟṟi kāṇi yāṇṭu potukaiyil yiṉṉāliloṉṟum Iṉṉāṉ mutal kāṇiyākap paṟṟi Aṉu
pavippārākavum Ippaṭi kāṇiyāṇṭu potumaḷavil Iṉṉālat toṉṟukkum kāṇiyāṉa Omandāvayal
pāttaṉ vayalum Iṉṉāliloṉṉāl varum maṉaikaḷum Iṉṉāḷ mutal paṟṟi Aṉupavittu koyil cuvanti
rattil nāliloṉṟukku Aṭaippāṉa nimantaṅkaḷukkum Āḷum Iṭṭu Iṉṉimain taṅkaḷukku Aṭaippā
ṉa nel nimantam nilaaṭaippu coṟṟaṭaippum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cuvantiraṅkaḷum paṟṟi Aṉu
pavittu tiruvākka viḷariyum nilakkāriya kkum kāriyaṅkaḷukkum nāliloṉṟukku Eḻuttu
mmiṭṭu Ittiruvācal kāriyamāka varum nalantiṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ marucāti Okka niṉṟu Aṉupavittu Iṉṉā
ḷ mutal kāṇiyāṇṭu potuvārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttom parākramapā
ṇṭiya naraciṅkatevaṟku śrī ruttira śrī maheśvararum tāṉattomum Ippaṭikku Ellā
ntalaiyāṉa pāṇṭiya piramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku virapāṇṭiya piramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku cokkapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu teva piḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kulaicekarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ālāla cuntarappaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ntira cekarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku mahādeva paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku parameśvabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu maḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi periyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu mā
pattiyam Uyya neṟikāṭṭināṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruvempaḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu Aṉukka
ntoṇṭaṉ Eḻuttu śrī civapattaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruvuṇṇāḻippiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku teyya
Ippaṭikku śrī māherapavarak kaṇakku tirukkai veḷi
perumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cokkanāyaṉār Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku tiruñāṉacampantaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
